## Goal

Describe the small user-facing improvement or cleanup.

## Suggested files

-

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The change is small and focused.
- [ ] Existing syntax checks or tests still pass.
- [ ] Docs are updated if behavior changes.

## Notes for contributors

Keep the pull request narrow. If you discover a larger refactor, mention it in the issue instead of expanding the first PR.
